chapter_title.en: Reason of occultation of the Imam from his followers

parts.text: فإن قيل: لو كان الأمر على ما قلتم لوجب أن لا يعلم شيئا من المعجزات في

text: الحال وهذا يؤدي إلى أن لا يعلم النبوة وصدق الرسول وذلك يخرجه عن الإسلام فضلا عن الإيمان.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: If it is said: If the case is as you are saying, it would be necessary that he does not know any of the miracles in this condition and this leads to not knowing prophethood and the veracity of the Prophet, which further takes him outside the bounds of not only faith (Iman), but also Islam.
